text:
0 - person did not use any service in the file
1/x - 1.0 - person used x distinct level 2 services in the file
 USER3_CNT Unduplicated SRVC_3 user count 0 - person did not use any service in the file
1.0 - person used the particular level 3 Medicaid service
Medicaid Cost FR_1 - 12 Monthly Federal rates XXX.XX
 FED_PMT_1 - 12 Monthly Federal share of all Medicaid payments (based on ending date of service) Value displayed in dollars and cents
 ST_PMT_1 - 12 Monthly State share of all Medicaid
